summary: Plan-only PR remediation shard. No GitHub mutations are allowed by mode or job blocked_actions. None of the five listed PRs has a complete merge preflight with resolved review-bot status plus Codex /review proof, so no merge_candidate is emitted. #94964 is not a safe repair/merge candidate because it mixes the gateway reload race with an unrelated QMD Windows path fix already tracked by #92302; the other PRs remain useful but need proof, maintainer review, or narrower follow-up before finalization.

actions.reason: Maintainer judgment is needed on whether to split the unrelated memory/QMD fix out of this gateway reload PR or redirect to a narrower canonical gateway PR. A cluster-scoped repair PR is not safe without choosing that scope.
Independent Matrix PR. Keep open for author/maintainer proof work; failing proof and missing merge preflight block merge, but no cluster mutation is appropriate.
Independent config/agents PR. Keep open; failing proof and missing merge preflight block merge, and the changes are not an appropriate Clownfish replacement-fix target in this shard.
Independent broad feature PR. Keep open for maintainer-owned review; merge and automated repair are blocked by broad scope and missing merge preflight.
Independent useful member PR. Keep open for maintainer review/final merge preflight; current artifact does not justify merge or replacement repair.

needs_human: #94964: decide whether to split the unrelated QMD Windows memory command parsing changes from the gateway reload race PR, or choose a narrower canonical gateway fix path among the hydrated #79487 family (#93046/#94772/#94964).
